goal: Expose state graph failure taxonomy, retryability, source, signal, run, timestamp, and relation provenance as machine-readable JSON without scraping the human failure report.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: Failure graph reports classify reachable failures and show relation provenance, but CI, release gates, and promotion scripts must parse human text to reason about failure classes and retryability.
